title: Gohan316427
content:
{{Top|rwp|title=gohan316427|sortkey=*Gohan316427}}
'''"gohan316427"''' co-wrote the backstory of [[Janu Godalhi/Legends|Janu Godalhi]] appearing in the [[Databank (original)|Databank]], through the ''[[What's The Story?]]'' feature of [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]].
